chip.name: none
chip.reason: All 8 chips already used (WC x2, TC x2, FH x2, BB x2). Nothing available for GW38.

transfers_detail.reason: No free-transfer upgrade beats holding. Bank is only 0.6m; any meaningful target (Gakpo ~46% template hole, Salah) costs far more than 0.6m and forces a sideways sale that does not raise the XI ceiling. GW38 price moves carry zero in-season value. Stand pat.

key_reasoning: INDEPENDENT CALL — I diverge from Gemini/sim-lab on the armband. sim-lab ranks Haaland top on raw EV (7.17, 36% haul) but the rotation flag is the most severe in the squad: it is Pep's final game with City's position settled, and both fixture-room and intel warn a final-day rest is likely and UNCOVERABLE. A captained Haaland who is rested or hooked early is the worst outcome for a rank-7 manager. I therefore captain SAKA: HOME vs relegated Everton (weighted FDR 2.0, joint-best fixture in the squad), elite G+A ceiling (EV 5.8, haul 19.6%), and lower rotation severity than an end-of-era Pep rest. Haaland is VICE so if Saka is confirmed rested the armband auto-transfers to the highest-ceiling asset in the game — I keep his upside as a backstop, not the headline bet. I REJECT the current Bowen armband (AWAY at Spurs, FDR 3.3, EV 5.26) on fixture and ceiling grounds. Note: squad.json lists every player AVAILABLE with no news, so I do NOT treat Haaland or the Arsenal trio as confirmed-out; they are rotation RISKS to verify on Friday/Saturday team news. XI is the standard Arsenal-heavy build; O'Reilly benched (MCI rotation) and Casemiro benched (MUN dead rubber away at BHA). Projected 82 trims ~3 off Gemini's 85 to price in the safer-but-lower captain ceiling (Saka x2 vs Haaland x2 baseline).
risks: Captaining Saka over Haaland: if Haaland starts and hauls, ~55% of the field doubles a big score and I single-count — the live downside of the differential armband.
Saka rotation: ARS title/CL context could see Saka rested too; VC Haaland is the hedge, but both ARS+MCI rotating in the same GW would hurt.
Bowen left uncaptained: if Bowen returns at Spurs the current armband would have paid off and my switch loses ground.
Gakpo (~46% owned) not in squad and uncoverable — passive template risk if he hauls.
Split call vs Gemini/sim-lab (both Haaland C) — Director should flag LOW captaincy consensus; user makes the final call after confirmed team news.
